title: Mahoraga Wheel
description:
Adds Mahoraga Wheel from Jujutsu Kaisen.

You adapt to pretty much all types of damage. it's a helmet that binds to the character till death.
body:
This mod adds the Eight-Handled Sword-Divergent Sila Divine General Mahoraga's Dharmachakra Wheel. Crafted using a gold ingot surrounded by eight gold blocks, the wheel binds permanently to its wearer's head unless they die or their weakness is exploited.

 

Wearing the wheel allows you to gradually adapt to most forms of damage as well as other more specific adaptations. Most adaptations begin the first time their respective damage is encountered and slowly adapt over time, while being slightly boosted by taking more hits of the same damage type. Pretty much all forms of damage can be fully adapted to such that the damage suffered is reduced to zero.

 

Some game-rules have been added, but the rate of adaptation cannot yet be adjusted.
